summary: Frontend-only iteration 4 verification of Atelier Onyx landing page. All requested changes verified: parallel diagonal stripes (both -10deg, NOT crossing) in Hero AND all 5 SectionDividers; radial-feathered watch image (floating, no rectangular bg); mobile 390px audit passes with zero horizontal scroll, no overflow, no console errors. All 5 collection tiles load (naturalWidth=1200), 12 WhatsApp CTAs all point to wa.me/15551234567, FAQ accordion expands, hero testids present.

issues: The two parallel stripes are very large/dominant — they visually cover ~70% of the watch image. The watch (already softened by radial mask) is partially obscured by the SHOP NOW stripe at the bottom. Consider thinner stripes or a larger vertical gap on desktop. Non-blocking; matches user reference, but worth a visual polish pass.

action_items: No critical action items. Optional polish: on desktop ≥1440px, the SHOP NOW stripe slightly overlaps the watch's lower half (watch is feathered so this is intentional-looking, but consider increasing vertical gap or shrinking stripe height for desktop).

Optional: 'Floating WhatsApp' element was NOT detected via common testids on mobile (data-testid='floating-whatsapp' / 'whatsapp-float'). It may have a different testid or be hidden until scroll. Confirm the element exists and has a stable data-testid for future regression.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero.jsx docblock (lines 8-11) is OUTDATED: comment says 'tilted +12deg (opposite direction)' for SHOP NOW but the code correctly uses -10deg (parallel). Update the comment to reflect parallel/same-direction stripes to avoid future confusion.
SectionDivider.jsx docblock (lines 5-7) has the same outdated comment ('SHOP NOW tilted +12deg right→left ascending') while the code correctly uses -10deg. Update docs.
Both Hero.jsx and SectionDivider.jsx duplicate the identical `stripeText` helper — extract into a shared component (e.g., DiagonalStripe.jsx) to follow DRY.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 verified parallel-stripe layout. Programmatic checks confirmed both Hero stripes and all 5 SectionDivider stripes use rotate(-10deg) — same angle, parallel, never crossing. Hero watch image uses maskImage: radial-gradient(circle, black 30%, rgba(0,0,0,0.85) 45%, transparent 72%) — floats with feathered edges. Mobile@390px: scrollW==clientW==390 (no horizontal overflow), 0 console errors, all collection images load (naturalWidth=1200), 12 WhatsApp CTAs detected with correct URL, FAQ accordion expands (aria-expanded false→true). Floating WhatsApp testid was not located — verify selector if you need to test it. Desktop@1440px also rendered 0 console errors.
rca of the issue: n/a — no bugs blocking. Only outdated code comments and one optional polish suggestion for desktop stripe sizing.
